reviews.review_description: If you wanna feel like you're in Nazi Germany, and under constant surveillance, play this game, I get muted every single day for 13 hours at a time, ruining my experience, and I am faced with toxicity CONSTANTLY if you're gonna add voice moderation, at least make some type of feature where you could see people insulting me, because I always go through the same cycle, of playing the game, getting muted out of nowhere, which, most of the time I cannot recall an actual reason for, getting targeted by someone, or I fight someone and they insult me, and poke fun at me because I can no longer talk, I feel so trapped playing this game now, I'm no longer allowed to defend myself against people that genuinely ruin my day, and my mood.

All 1 star reviews just say “it’s to hard” or “I got banned for no reason” EVEN THOUGH they are most likely all deserved, but for people who complain about toxicity, I agree, there is a lot of toxicity in this game, but there are 2 simple fixes, first, just leave the game. Second is to turn voice chat off. You don’t need to talk if EVERYONE is toxic.

I was a former staff member who was removed for speaking their mind about an extremely unfair situation involving a ban. The community manager Mac removed me from staff and then her moderators threatened to ban me. I have also had several issues either homophobia in this game and the moderation never works. The moderators have short tempers and let emotions get in the way of their professional job. DO NOT RECOMMEND GETTING THIS GAME.

I was in a private lobby with my friend and we were in a private call and we were saying some stuff, but somehow I got permanently banned when I was talking in the call and not in game and you get muted 24/7, when there’s a kid screaming the N-word and they somehow don’t get muted, the voice moderation system is actually￼ horrible, I tried to appeal my ban twice cause this happened back in September I have not been unbanned ￼

I would like more things for solo and co-op because I have a friend who just dosent like pvp and I want to hang out with him more. Personally I think it need PVE as well all the PVE options are not good more you just fighting robots not actual benders like the game is so I think it's not ideal for people to think that they can play PVE and fight benders but you should keep the robots just make it longer and add more variants that's all for my request please if you can make this a thing?

I say that this game has horrendous voice patrol because I’m okay getting voice chat muted twice but then when I learn my lesson actually nevermind because the first time I got voice chat muted it was because I said someone was a disgrace to fire bending but when someone is saying slurs to someone and they just don’t get voice chat muted is just terrible voice detection or whatever it is but now I’m writing a review that probably won’t be seen by anybody but I just need to let out what I truly feel because I just got voice chat banned for lagging out of elements and I know it was from me lagging out because MY MIC WAS MUTED STRAIGHT UP MUTED AND AS SOON AS I JOIN BACK IT SAYS A MESSAGE LIKE you have been voice chat banned email some crappy company or whatever it’s called to get this appealed like at this point just don’t let people talk to each other because you just get voice chat muted or just say when you voice chat ban someone also include what you got voice chat banned for and the exact words you said any way that’s it. Also if you see me my names oatgroat in game and if you reads this and you know  just know I wrote this

the reason why it's a bad game is because i got permanently banned from it for no reason and when i emailed them they said the reason that i was banned and i said that that never happened and they said that they've seen replay on my voice recording and stuff but i told them that i never said that and they don't believe me and that's why they won't unband me and they saying that the i can't get on bend and that's why this game is bad because they ban you for no absolute reason and I got mic banes again for putting a game mode on it and this was on a different account

I was almost max level water and 180 fire, 110 earth, and 60 air. Then the game decided it would be funny to reset my entire account, remove everything. Even made me replay the tut. I know it’s not that deep but I might genuinely cry. Used to love this game I hate everything about it.

If you had asked me to rate this without the voicemod, then it would be 5 stars. 

Sadly, the voice moderation in this game is completely broken and doesn't have a way to contact someone to support you built in. 

It's only happened a few times, but I will sometimes say something and will get voicebanned for an hour or 2 for nothing. 

For example, today, I loaded onto the capture the flag game mode and asked someone, "How does this version of capture the flag work?" I was then voicebanned for 2 hours. 

I assume it detected the f slur, but it is stopping me from playing the game as I am now close to a full voiceban and don't want to be stopped from properly playing the game forever.

The game overall is good, i love the gameplay and most of the player base, but i keep getting voice banned over things that make no sense, i told someone "come here, i'm gonna get you." And then i got voice banned, i also see a lot of players in the lobby getting voice banned for absolutely no reason at all.

Thats all i got for now please take these into consideration

This game is so fun and so good to control the elements and the sub ones but there is one thing i am trying to play as a new player and i always say dont combo me im new and im getting comboed by toxic players is the voice mods deaf because they keep swearing and someone got banned for saying crap like hello??? Pls fix this but the game is great and fun to master the elements

Like the title says,you need listen to feedback as your game is early access and needs all the help it can get to become friendly

Good mechanics but combat feels too fast paced,air players quite literally teleport,grapples are too easy,and its air dominated,if you could ground each element rather than make them gods,that'd not only make it realistic but balanced,also put in something called 'affinities',each element has perks and drawbacks,like earth moves quicker on land,water extuingishes fire,air floats midair,and fire can burn earth but is negated by air vacuums because fire needs oxygen,I'm not saying stuff like water beats fire,but natural qualities that are IRL to make it like you have to strategise and know science

This game is entirely PvP focused,the PvE are either too hard or not stimulating enough,this game would really do with more game modes like a team death match instead of battle royale free for alls which stress out the target audience,the meta needs a change too

It could take inspo from ironstrike which has 6 classes but are all somehow equally balanced,based on skill rather than moveset,if they found a way to make all elements balanced(because elements are naturally balanced like in the actual show) and have sub-elements make sense(how does plants come from water)it would make for a perfect avatar game,also maybe have us hold keybinds to use sub elements because some take away original moves

If we could select the servers and game modes we join instead of a global one,that'd be great too,improve the UI to have different gamemodes we can join and host rather than just quickplay or singleplayer and party,this would clean up the junk,and make it feel arcade like and appeal to those who actually know what they want rather than leaving it up to a host,also add a campaign I guess,like others say

Revamp the maps to make them more gritty and try not to make everything so flashy,which can be distracting,also PLEASE add skill based matchmaking,everyone complains about being paired with levels hundreds of times theirs,it really isn't fair,consider other gamemodes too like missions and death matches and escort,free for all is limiting this game severely by stressing out new players and rotating skilled ones,as it is now,it is just not beginner friendly

Do have a revamp of the meta tho,and balance the elements so they're actually about skill,and who is the best avatar,not who is the best spammer

And until then,I want my money back

I was playing as earth and then my game just crashes (it was full battery so can’t be that) and next lobby I went into I was using water I kill one person then the whole lobby ￼were calling racist slurs and yelling that I unalive myself

The game itself is fun. I love playing it and the best part in my opinion is that community. It’s very based around skill but once you’re good you learn about people and you learn from people. Despite how much of the player base feels, the devs do not see it the same way. Many of them do not play and simply review based on voice chat logs where they have a fairly strict voice control. I was once banned for saying “the zest” because someone asks what the peel of a lemon is called. They ban people who sign up for tournaments from playing the gam forever not because they were glitch abusing or hacking, but 90% of the time it’s based on what they say. Bjorn was a beloved player who wanted to play competitively but  he ended up banned. Free Bjorn.

reviews.review_title: Big Suggestions to Make This Game Even B
reviews.review_description:
Hi! I just want to say that this game is really good, especially the multiplayer mode. Playing with friends is very fun and enjoyable. The gameplay is nice and the idea of the game is great.
However, sometimes there are some bugs and small problems. I hope you can fix them in future updates.
I also would like to suggest adding some basic features, like a proper Friend Request system and better friend options. For example, being able to accept friends easily, invite them even when some modes are closed, and have smoother multiplayer interaction.
It would also be amazing if you could make the map a little bigger. Not too big like a full Battle Royale map, but just slightly larger to make the game more interesting.
Right now it’s mostly 1v1. Maybe you could add team modes like 2v2, 3v3, or even 4v4, so friends can play together in the same match. That would make the game much more fun.
Another great idea would be adding monsters, not only human characters. For example, different types of creatures, maybe something similar to Gollum-style creatures or other fantasy monsters. You could also add stronger bosses and different monster types to make the game more exciting and challenging.
Adding some dungeons, classic-style missions, and more new missions would also make the game even better.
Overall, the game is already very good. But if you add these features, it could become legendary. It has the potential to become one of the most famous and best games out there.
To everyone reading this message: please like and share it so the developers can see it. This game has huge potential!
Thank you for your hard work!

2.
Unfair kinda leads off of toxic but why im i in a lobby’s with super high levels and not trying to have some match making in their gameplay experience.

3. 
Poorly balanced because I personally think it makes sense for the earth bender to be more on the ground and the fire bender to be a mobile earth bender but weaker and water be a balance between the two and air being super mobile and fast with faster weaker attacks but  water and fire and ok maybe a less mobility on fire but earth is so over tuned because you can easly fly with earth and move so fast for example i was playing air which is my favourite so i know all the move but I )couldn’t even get close to earth bender.
